titleStmt.title: SII 20.84: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 84. (B.K. No. 67 of 1935-36.) BĀḶAMBĪḌ, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in Baladēvara Guḍi.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 47, Śōbhakṛit, Paushya, śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1123, December 24. But there was no solar eclipse on the preceding Āmāvāsyā.

The inscription records a gift of land, etc., for offerings and worship to god Brahmēśvara by Bammagāvuṇḍa who had the temple constructed at Baḷḷāreya-bīḍu which was under his administration. The gift was made over to Vimaḷas11aktipaṇḍita who was the disciple of Nirvvāṇaśaktidēva, the āchārya of the Maṭha attached to the temple of Chikkēśvara. The latter is said to have been the rājaguru of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tailapadēva who was governing Banavāsi-12000 and Pānuṁgal-500 provinces.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇada nelevīḍi noḷu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyiyuttamire . © . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarēśvaraṁ jayaṁtīmadhukēśvaralabdhavara
prasādaṁ mrigamadāmōdaṁ kṣatriyapavitraṁ pratāpamārttaṁḍamārkkoḷuvaragaṁḍaṁ nā
mādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tayilapadēvarasaru pānuṁ
gallanelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta pānuṁgallayinūṟuma
banavāsipannircchāsiramumaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyiṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ
geyidu sukhadināḷuttamire . © . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . manneyagētaṁgaṁ guṇa dunnatiyaṁ
taḷada kaṁcikabbegaṁ Ogedarmmunnina pāṁḍutanūbhavaraṁnnar puruśārtthatīrttha raivarmmakkaḷ .
piriyaṁ barmmane dharmmarājanesedippāsama bhīmananyaroḷaṁ piridanappa śōbhanane
tāṁ mikkarjjunaṁ siṁganuṁ puruśārtthāgraṇi Aycanuṁ lakuḷanuṁ sādēvarkka
ḷāgalu vasuṁdhareyoḷu pāṁḍavarinnumirddarenaliṁtī Ayvaruṁ raṁjiparu . © . © .
Āvaroḷa tipratāpavibhavaṁ kali sōbhananuttarōttarapravipuḷabhōgi śōbhananapārayasaṁThe letterḷa is written above the line.
kali sōbhanaṁ guṇārnnavatuhināṁsu śōbhananudārada tavarumane śōbhanaṁ babāppavari
varannanē nijakuḷāṁbaracaṁḍamarīci śōbhana . negaḻda guṇāṁbudhi siṁgavibhugaṁ kuḷabhūśa
ṇeyappa bāgaḷabbegamavanītaḷaṁ pogaḷe puṭṭidarujvaḷacārukīrttilakṣmige patigaḷu
vivēkanidhigaḷuvī śōbhana bammagauvuṁḍugaḷu . puruśārtthada nele satyada karu pa
rahitalakṣmigirkedāṇaṁ saucācāradabāḷmoda lallennade naraneṁbudu siṁganaṇuganaṁ śōbhanana . © .
Avanoḍavuṭṭida kauravavallabhanoḍane puṭṭidairāvataveṁbavoluditakīrtti lakṣmībha
vanaṁ jayalakṣmigāṇmanenisuva bamma . bhavacaraṇābjaṣaṭucaraṇanūrjjitabhaktila
tāmanapriyaṁ kuvaḷeyabaṁdhu vīralakṣmīniṭaḷāgralalāmanāśritōtsavakarananna
napratimacārugabhīranenutta kūrttu bhūbhuvanamadāgaḷuṁ bayasi baṇnisutippudu
bammagāvuṁḍana . keḷaḻda kisōrakēsarige kōḷmasagirdda viśōragaṁge kappuḷisi kunuṁgi pāyiva puli
garjjisutippa javaṁge nōrppaḍaggaḷavene kondu kūguvanarātibaḷaṁ taledōṟe bammigaṁ muḷidaḍe mri
ttu mīṟidaḍe māri kaḍaṁgidoḍāṁpa gaṁḍarāru . meccidaḷīgaḷīga kali bammagavuṁḍana tōḷoḷi
ḻdu meyveccida vīralakṣmi naramāṁsamaniṁbalukilla vairiganyarccaladiṁdavāpa villenutaṁ biḍi
nōḍi cīlipaṁ sārccida vairabhīkaracirāyuvanājiyoḷēṁ pravīṇanō . girijegavīśvaraṁga
vanurāgade ṣaṇmukhanoldu puṭṭuvaṁtire kali śōbhanaṁgavakhiḷātaḷasaṁstute mallikavvegaṁ nirupa
makīrtti vīralakṣmīpati puṭṭidanātmavaṁśavistaramahimāprabhāvanenutippudu cīlamanaṁ jagajjanaṁ .
pesarggoṁḍaṁ kritapuṇyanīkṣisidavaṁ nisvānōraṁte bhāvisidaṁdu sthitidūranōlagisidaṁ
dhanyaṁ samaṁtaṁ meccisidaṁ tannanākuḷaṁ sukhiyenalu pēḷanyasāmānyanē vaduviśruta
vāmaśaktimunipaṁ lōkaikarakṣākṣama . Ī vasudhege cikkēśvaradēvara maṭhaṁ
Adikamaṭhanantāśrayamāyitu vibhūtitapōvibhavada vāmaśaktiyatipatiyiṁdaṁ .
tavage sadaivameṁba paramēśvaranappa sadāśivaṁ sadugurugaḷu vāmaśaktidēvariṁtenalu dhanyaneṁ
daḍēvaṁṇnipeṁ jagadoḷārppaḍi pāsaṭiyeṁdaḍē yogaḷvudō mahāmuni vimaḷaśaktiya
niṁtu caritrayyuktiya . © yiṁdina diname subhōdayamiṁdina dinamivargge puṇya dinameṁ
duṁ baṁdu munijanamuṁ pesarggoḷvudiṁdaṁ vimaḷaśakti vudubhavabhakti . Elelele kāma nīnuṁ ma
leyade pō pōgu ninna kabbina billaṁ guṇavoṁde vimaḷaśaktiya śagḍu(ḍgu)ṇamaṁ gela vudaridu ninnaḷavalla . sthiraṁ jīyāt .
© svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīḷaguṇa saṁpannarappa śrī
matailahadēvana rājagurugaḷappa śrī cikkēśvaradēvara maṭhadācāryyarappa śrīmaṁnirvvā
ṇaśaktidēvara śiṣyarappa śrīmatu vimaḷaśaktipaṁḍitadēvarige haḍivūra bammagāvuṁḍa tanna prabhutvadū
ru baḷḷāreya bīḍinalu tāvu māḍisida brahmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōga jaḷa gaṁdhākṣate puspa dhūpa dīpa nivēdya
tāṁbūḻameṁba Aṣṭavidhārcanegaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōdhārakkaṁ māṭakūṭa prāsādā nēkakarmmāṁ
tarakkaṁ caitrapaitrakkeṁdu Aṁkalegeṟeya tuṁbina modalēriya keḷage dēvargge koṭṭa gadde kamma 50 mattaṁ
Allirdda tapōdhanarāhāradānakkameṁdu koṭṭa gadde kamma 50 Aṁtu mattaroṁdu Alliṁ mūḍa muguḷiya
haḷḷada baḷiya hakkalu mattaroṁdu Adaṟoḷage dēvargge hakkalu kamma 60 matta tapō dhanargge koṭṭa hakkalu
kaṁmmaḷaṁ Antu hakkalu mattaroṁdu matta Aṁkalegeṟeya keḷage Ainūṟu marada tōṁṭa mattaṁ dēvara
naṁdādīvigege māneṁṇne koḷagaviṁḍi biṭṭa gāṇa 1 mattaṁ taṁbuligasāsirvvarirddu dēvargge hēṟiṁgoṁdu vīsamaṁ
koṭṭaru mattaṁ talevoṟegarevīsa gurugaḷa magaḷu kuṟuvara bāgiyakka dēvara garbbhagriha sokhanāsiya kelasakkeṁ
du koṭṭa gadyāṇa 15 matta gurugaḷa magaḷu Uttarakabbe dēvakāryyamaṁ gurugaḷa kāryyamaṁ janmajanmāṁtara na
ḍevuttire © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 47 śōbhakritu saṁvatsara pauśya suddha paṁcami sōma
vuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpāta sūryagrahaṇadaṁdu varadānadiya paścimatīra
li śrīmanu mahāprabhu bammagāṁvuṁḍaṁ śrīvimaḷaśaktipaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ
dhārā pūrvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭariṁtī dharmmamanārōrvvaru pratipāḷisidargge gaṁge vāra
kurukṣētra prayāgeyarghyatīrtthameṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirakavileya kōḍuṁ ko
paṁcaratnadoḷu kaṭṭisi sāsirvvaru vēdapāragarumappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ tapōdhana
yamukhi dānaṁgoṭṭa phaḷamakku . Iṁtī dharmmamanāvanōrvvanaḷidanā puṇyatīrtthaṁ
ḷu Ā brāhmaṇarumanā tapōdhanarumanā kavileyumanaḷida paṁcamahā
makku . Ā grāmēśvaradēvarige biṭṭa gāṇada māneṇne Ā dēvarige I dē varige
rmmasētuṟunripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadubhi sarvvānētānu bhāgina
yō yācatē rāmabhadra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti va
srāṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . © I sthāna cikkēśvarada ma
tapōdhanara gauḍuṁ prajegaḷumirddu hola
brahmēśvara
Digital edition of SII 20.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
